sections.paragraph:
m. יְחִידָה f. (from יָחַד).-

(1) only, especially only begotten, only child, Gen 22:2, 12 Gen 22:12, 16 Gen 22:16 Jer 6:26 Zec 12:10 Pro 4:3 and fem. יְחִידָה Jud. 11:34 .

(2) solitary; hence forsaken, wretched, Psa 25:16 68:7 .

(3) f. יְחִידָה only one, hence that which is most dear, that which cannot be replaced, poet. for life, Psa 22:21 35:17 [does not this pervert both the passages?] comp. כָּבֹוד.

[“יְחִיָּה (‘Jehovah lives’), [Jehiah], pr.n. m. 1Ch 15:24.”]
